_doc: Per-line validator configuration. The _default key applies to every cruise line; line-specific keys override _default. Both validate-ship-page.sh and validate-ship-page.js read this file. See admin/SHIP_STANDARDIZATION_PLAN.md and admin/POLICY_DECISIONS.md for the rationale behind each value.

carnival._doc: Carnival template uses id="main" rather than id="main-content". Convention, not bug. Documented per Policy 1.1.

holland-america-line._doc: HAL template uses .col-1 single-column layout in some sections rather than .page-grid two-column. Convention, not bug.

rcl._doc: RCL flagships consistently ship 10+ images; raise the floor for this line.

ai_summary_boilerplate_phrases: deck plans, live tracker, dining venues, and stateroom videos. Plan your Royal Caribbean cruise
deck plans, live tracker, dining venues, and stateroom videos. Plan your
_doc_boilerplate: ai_summary_boilerplate_phrases: ≥1 hit on a ship's ai-summary => ICP-018 ERROR. The first phrase is the exact 6-ship boilerplate we found. Other entries are common templated tells that should never appear in a unique summary.
_doc_main_entity: main_entity_whitelist/blacklist: drives SCHEMA-002. mainEntity @type must be in whitelist; @type in blacklist is BLOCKING. See admin/POLICY_DECISIONS.md § 0.1 for rationale (Cruise is wrong shape — it's an itinerary instance, not an evergreen ship reference).
